prompt_1:
/* Fetleka tshedimosetso ya XML mme o boele o ntshe tshedimosetso ya moithuti go ya ka leina la modirisi le lefoko la sephiri. Tshedimosetso ya XML e tla ba le sebopego se se latelang:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Re ka aga potso ya XPath mme re e dirise go batla.

@param xml_data Tshedimosetso ya XML e e nang le tshedimosetso ya moithuti.
@param username Leina la modirisi la moithuti yo o batlang go mo batla.
@param password Lefoko la sephiri la moithuti yo o batlang go mo batla.

@return Mephato e e nang le tshedimosetso ya moithuti (leina, dingwaga, setshaba) fa e fitlhelwa, go seng jalo mephato e e se nang sepe. */
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
